about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I'm a Front-End Developer specializing in React.js and Next.js. Currently studying Computer Science while gaining real-world experience through internships with international tech teams.
about.paragraph2: I focus on building responsive, scalable, and high-performance web applications using modern technologies like React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Redux Toolkit.
about.paragraph3: I focus not only on building interfaces, but also on how users interact with them — ensuring every element serves a purpose, whether it's engagement, clarity, or conversion.

studytrack.title: StudyTrack – Study Management Dashboard
studytrack.desc: Interactive study dashboard with task management, progress tracking, and Firebase integration.

restaurant.title: Restaurant Web App
restaurant.desc: Modern restaurant application with menu browsing, cart system, and smooth animations.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Store
ecommerce.desc: Fully functional e-commerce application with cart management, routing system, and dynamic state handling using React Context.

weather.title: Weather
weather.desc: Real-time weather  with API integration, search functionality, and advanced state handling.

facebook.title: Facebook Clone
facebook.desc: Social media platform clone with full post system, authentication, and dynamic API integration.

pharmacy.title: Pharmacy Landing Page
pharmacy.desc: A conversion-focused pharmacy landing page built with Next.js, tailored for a pharmacy chain in Upper Egypt. Features Arabic RTL support, structured SEO data, and clear service presentation including 24/7 delivery and medical consultations.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Next.js App
fullstack.desc: Full-stack application built with Next.js, Prisma, and MySQL with server-side rendering and full CRUD operations.

safarni.title: Safarni – Travel Booking Platform
safarni.desc: Advanced travel booking platform with full flight booking flow, secure payment system, and dynamic state management using Redux Toolkit.

experience.title: Experience & Learning Journey
experience.subtitle: Internships, education and hands-on experience in frontend development
learningPoints: Building personal projects to improve practical skills
Following modern React and Next.js best practices
Practicing problem solving and clean code principles

huma.title: Frontend Developer Intern
huma.desc: Worked on two large-scale real-world platforms (Medical & Travel) using modern frontend technologies with a focus on performance, scalability, and clean architecture.
responsibilities: Developed full authentication system (login, signup, validation, protected routes)
Built core UI components including Home page, Navigation and user flows
Worked on Travel Platform modules: Payment, Flight Booking, Destinations, Favorites and Compare features
Implemented reusable and scalable components using React, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
Managed global state using Redux Toolkit
Collaborated with team using Git workflow, branches, pull requests and code reviews

saiket.title: Frontend Developer Intern
saiket.desc: Built interactive and user-focused web pages while following modern UI/UX principles and improving performance and accessibility.
responsibilities: Developed responsive web pages using HTML, CSS and JavaScript
Debugged and fixed UI issues to enhance performance and user experience
Applied clean code practices and structured components effectively
Worked on real tasks and contributed to production-ready features
Participated in technical and soft-skill feedback sessions

contact.title: Let's Get In Touch

contact.connectDesc: I'm a Front-End Developer specializing in React.js and Next.js. I'm currently studying Computer Science and always open to internships, freelance projects, and collaboration opportunities. Feel free to reach out!
